hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r .tool_input.file_path 2>/dev/null); if echo $FILE | grep -qE semantica/; then python -c 'import ast,sys; ast.parse(open(sys.argv[1]).read())' $FILE 2>&1; fi
CMD=$(jq -r .tool_input.command 2>/dev/null); if echo $CMD | grep -q deduplication/methods; then echo WARNING: use DuplicateDetector directly >&2; fi
